top_signals.title: US Renews Iran Strikes as Both Sides Dispute Hormuz Status
top_signals.summary: The US launched fresh missile attacks against Iran on Sunday in what has become a pattern of strikes and counterstrikes by Washington and Tehran as the two sides issued conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz is open to shipping.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches another round of strikes on Iran as ceasefire teeters
top_signals.summary: Fighting escalates as Trump insists the Strait of Hormuz remains open while Tehran says it is closed
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU buys record amount of gas from Russia’s flagship plant
top_signals.summary: Europe purchased almost all the LNG produced by the Yamal facility in the first half of 2026 ahead of import ban
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
